## Summary

What this change does in one or two sentences.

## Details

- What instruction / account / constraint changed and why.
- The privacy or correctness invariant it preserves or improves.

## Wire format

- [ ] No change to instruction or account discriminators
- [ ] No change to the verifying key
- [ ] If either changed, `jat-circuits` / `jat-sdk` updated to match (link the PRs)

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes (real proof verifies, on-chain root matches)
- [ ] Built with `anchor build`

## Notes

Anything a reviewer should look at first, or anything still open.
